Price Book
Your standard pricing. Zips not assigned to a specific list are priced by the Default list — add a list and assign zips to price an area differently.
Loading…
Customers
Your customer list — not a CRM. Download the Template for the exact columns before importing. ⓘ import help
Columns (header row, in any order): type, company, first_name, last_name, street, city, state, zip, email, phone.
• type — “Residential” or “Commercial”.
• Residential → fill first_name / last_name (leave company blank).
• Commercial → fill company (first/last optional, for a contact).
• street is required for the Street View cover photo & routing — rows without one import but are flagged ⚠ needs street.
• state = 2 letters (MA), zip = 5 digits. email is the match key — re-importing updates existing customers by email (no duplicates).
• Older files with a single name / address column still work (best effort): residential names parse as “Last, First”, and city/state/zip are pulled from the address.
Loading…
Yard Sign Settings

Tools Inventory
The Job Plan AI uses this list to recommend which tools to load for each route. Tools marked "on truck" are always available — specialty tools get called out per stop when needed.

Split Pricing
OFF — Total trucks × full truck rate
2.875 × $899 = $2,584.63
ON — Whole trucks + fractional tier
2×$899 + 7/8×$825 = $2,623.00

Send feedback
Tell us what's working, what's broken, or what you'd like to see. Include as much detail as you can — what you were doing, what you expected, what happened instead.
